name: notebooklm-skill
description: TypeScript port of NotebookLM Claude Code Skill with improved performance and single-binary distribution

scripts.build:binary: bun build src/cli.ts --compile --outfile bin/notebooklm --external playwright --external playwright-core
scripts.build:binary:linux: bun build src/cli.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile bin/notebooklm-linux-x64 --external playwright --external playwright-core
scripts.build:binary:macos: bun build src/cli.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile bin/notebooklm-macos-x64 --external playwright --external playwright-core && bun build src/cli.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile bin/notebooklm-macos-arm64 --external playwright --external playwright-core
scripts.build:binary:windows: bun build src/cli.ts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile bin/notebooklm-windows-x64.exe --external playwright --external playwright-core
scripts.build:binary:all: bun run build:binary:linux && bun run build:binary:macos && bun run build:binary:windows
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run build && bun run build:binary:all

author: Dave Hardy
